title: Add MarketNow API вҖ” MCP skill marketplace (8,560 skills, x402, USDC)
author: edgarfloresguerra2011-a11y
body:
## MarketNow API

Public JSON API for MCP skills. No auth required for reads.

- GET /api/skills-lite.json вҖ” 8,560 skills (4.5MB)
- GET /api/search?q=query вҖ” Server-side search
- GET /api/agent.json вҖ” Machine-readable instructions
- POST /api/agent-purchase вҖ” Buy skills with USDC on Base
- GET /api/manifest?health вҖ” Live health check

API docs: https://marketnow.site/handshake
OpenAPI: https://marketnow.site/api/openapi.json
Site: https://marketnow.site

Category: Development / AI Tools

title: Add Kiprio SSL Inspector to Security
author: ForeverTools
body:
## Description

Adds [Kiprio SSL Inspector](https://kiprio.com/v1/ssl/) to the **Security** category.

## Table Entry

```
| [Kiprio SSL Inspector](https://kiprio.com/v1/ssl/) | SSL certificate details: issuer, expiry, SANs, cipher, TLS grade | `apiKey` | Yes | Yes |
```

## Verification

- API is publicly accessible: `curl https://kiprio.com/v1/ssl/demo?domain=example.com` returns JSON
- HTTPS: вң…
- CORS: вң… (`access-control-allow-origin: *`)
- Free demo tier at `/v1/ssl/demo`, apiKey for full access
- Endpoint: https://kiprio.com/v1/ssl/

## Checklist

- [x] Entry added in alphabetical order (between IPLogs and LoginRadius in Security section)
- [x] API name has no "API" suffix
- [x] Description is under 100 characters
- [x] All columns have proper spacing
- [x] HTTPS Yes, CORS Yes, Auth `apiKey`

title: Add: Kairos Signal вҖ” DAG Manifold API + Checkout API + MCP Server
author: OV3RK177
body:
## APIs to add

### 1. DAG Manifold Correlation API
- **API URL:** https://dag.kairossignal.com
- **Documentation:** https://dag.kairossignal.com/llms.txt
- **OpenAPI:** https://dag.kairossignal.com/openapi.json
- **Auth:** API Key (free tier: 10 req/day)
- **HTTPS:** Yes
- **CORS:** Yes
- **Description:** 256-dimensional non-abelian manifold correlation engine. Pairwise distance, Wilson loop curvature, Lyapunov chaos detection, nearest neighbors.
- **Category:** Finance / Science & Math

### 2. Kairos Signal Checkout API
- **API URL:** https://checkout.kairossignal.com
- **OpenAPI:** https://checkout.kairossignal.com/openapi.json
- **Auth:** None (browse), Stripe for purchase
- **Description:** 27 Stripe-live data products. Browse via /api/packages, buy via /api/checkout.
- **Category:** Data / Business

### 3. MCP Server
- **Endpoint:** https://kairossignal.com/mcp/
- **Registry:** https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/v0.1/servers/io.github.OV3RK177%2Fkairos-signal/versions/1.0.0
- **Tools:** 10 (property intelligence, market data, federal contracts, autonomous purchase)
- **Free tier:** 50 queries/day
- **Category:** Data / AI

Homepage: https://kairossignal.com

title: Add Kairos Signal вҖ” DAG Manifold Correlation API + Property Intelligence
author: OV3RK177
body:
## Kairos Signal

**API URL:** https://dag.kairossignal.com  
**Documentation:** https://dag.kairossignal.com/llms.txt  
**OpenAPI:** https://dag.kairossignal.com/openapi.json  
**Auth:** API Key (free tier: 10 req/day)  
**HTTPS:** Yes  
**CORS:** Yes  

### Description
256-dimensional DAG Manifold Correlation Engine. 63-layer continuous-time Symplectic Neural ODE computes topological invariants of real market signals. Pairwise distance, Wilson loop curvature, Lyapunov early-warning alerts, nearest neighbors.

### Endpoints
- GET /api/v1/manifold/distance вҖ” pairwise manifold distance between any symbols
- GET /api/v1/manifold/wilson/curvature вҖ” gauge anomaly detection
- GET /api/v1/manifold/lyapunov/alert вҖ” chaos detection early warning
- GET /api/v1/manifold/nearest вҖ” nearest manifold neighbors
- GET /api/v1/manifold/cross-sector вҖ” cross-sector analysis

### Pricing
- Free: 10 req/day
- Pro: $299/mo вҖ” 1,000 req/day
- Quant: $499/mo вҖ” 10,000 req/day + Wilson alerts

### Category
Data / Finance / Science & Math

Homepage: https://kairossignal.com

title: Add Free Dictionary API under Dictionaries category
author: TusharSaini999
body:
## Description

While looking through the available APIs, I found that the Free Dictionary API is not currently listed in the repository.

It would be a great fit for the Dictionaries category because it provides free access to word definitions, phonetics, and audio pronunciations without requiring any API key.

## Suggested Entry

Add this entry under the `### Dictionaries` section:

| API | Description | Auth | HTTPS | CORS |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Free Dictionary API](https://dictionaryapi.dev/) | Free audio pronunciation, phonetics, and definitions | No | Yes | Yes |

## Why this would be useful

- Completely free and easy to use
- No registration or authentication required
- Useful for dictionary apps, learning tools, and language-related projects
- Supports definitions, meanings, phonetics, and pronunciation data

This API can be accessed directly using public GET requests.

title: Add Mascot Car Rental API (car rental booking, Kos Greece)
author: gdoumou85
body:
## API

- **Name:** Mascot Car Rental API
- **Description:** Real-time car rental availability, pricing, and booking for Kos island, Greece. Designed for AI agent integration.
- **URL:** https://mascotcarrental.com/api/public/openapi.json
- **Auth:** No
- **HTTPS:** Yes
- **CORS:** Yes
- **Category:** Transportation

## Details

Open public REST API for a car rental company on Kos island, Greece. Endpoints cover vehicle availability, insurance options, extras, pricing calculation, and booking submission. No authentication required. Includes AI agent discovery via llms.txt, OpenAPI spec, and MCP.

Documentation: https://mascotcarrental.com/llms.txt

title: lodka
author: gulmariyas
body:
import pygame
import sys

# РҳРҪРёСҶРёР°Р»РёР·Р°СҶРёСҸ Pygame
pygame.init()

# Р Р°Р·РјРөСҖ РҫРәРҪР°
WIDTH, HEIGHT = 800, 600
screen = pygame.display.set_mode((WIDTH, HEIGHT))
pygame.display.set_caption("РӣРҫРҙРәР°")

# РҰРІРөСӮР°
SKY = (135, 206, 235)
WATER = (0, 119, 190)
BROWN = (139, 69, 19)
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)
BLACK = (0, 0, 0)

# Р“Р»Р°РІРҪСӢР№ СҶРёРәР»
running = True
while running:
    # РӨРҫРҪ
    screen.fill(SKY)

    # Р’РҫРҙР°
    pygame.draw.rect(screen, WATER, (0, 350, WIDTH, 250))

    # РҡРҫСҖРҝСғСҒ Р»РҫРҙРәРё
    boat_body = [(300, 350), (500, 350), (450, 420), (350, 420)]
    pygame.draw.polygon(screen, BROWN, boat_body)

    # РңР°СҮСӮР°
    pygame.draw.line(screen, BLACK, (400, 250), (400, 350), 5)

    # РҹР°СҖСғСҒ
    sail = [(400, 250), (400, 330), (480, 330)]
    pygame.draw.polygon(screen, WHITE, sail)

    # РһРұРҪРҫРІР»РөРҪРёРө СҚРәСҖР°РҪР°
    pygame.display.flip()

    # РһРұСҖР°РұРҫСӮРәР° СҒРҫРұСӢСӮРёР№
    for event in pygame.event.get():
        if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
            running = False

pygame.quit()
sys.exit()

title: GoldBean вҖ” Pay-per-use API marketplace: OCR, Translation, NLP, LLM via Baidu AI (free tier available)
author: wuzenghai616-lang
body:
# GoldBean рҹ«ҳ вҖ” x402 Micropaid API Marketplace

GoldBean provides access to **Baidu AI APIs** (OCR, Translation, NLP, ERNIE LLM) through a simple pay-per-use model. **Free tier** with 5 API endpoints included.

## Why add GoldBean?
- вң… **Free tier available** (5 endpoints at $0)
- вң… **Baidu General High-Precision OCR** вҖ” 96%+ accuracy on Chinese/English text
- вң… **Baidu Translation** вҖ” 50+ language pairs
- вң… **Baidu NLP** вҖ” Sentiment analysis, entity recognition, keyword extraction
- вң… **ERNIE LLM** вҖ” Baidu's flagship large language model
- вң… **Pay-as-you-go** from $0.01/call, no monthly fees, no minimums
- вң… **Alipay + PayPal + x402 crypto micropayments** вҖ” Global payment options
- вң… **OpenAI-compatible REST API** вҖ” drop-in replacement
- вң… **No Chinese phone number required** for registration

## API Endpoints
| Category | Endpoints |
|----------|-----------|
| OCR | General OCR, High-Precision OCR, PaddleOCR-VL, ID Card, Bank Card, Driving License, Business License, Vehicle License |
| Translation | General Translation (50+ languages) |
| NLP | Sentiment Analysis, Entity Recognition, Keyword Extraction |
| LLM | ERNIE Chat Completion |

## Pricing
| Plan | Price | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|:----------:|
| Free | $0 | 5 endpoints |
| Pay-per-use | $0.01вҖ“$0.50/call | Unlimited |
| Monthly | $29.9 | 100 req/min |
| Quarterly | $69 | 500 req/min |
| Yearly | $269 | 1000 req/min |

**Website**: https://goldbean-api.xyz
**Documentation**: https://goldbean-api.xyz/docs
**GitHub**: https://github.com/wuzenghai616-lang/goldbean

> GoldBean (GB) вҖ” Wishing You Good Fortune & Prosperity рҹ«ҳ

title: Aether Bridge API - Autonomous Agent Team Management for API Developers
author: atomeam
body:
## рҹҡҖ Aether Bridge API - /month

I've built an autonomous agent team management API that can manage API workflows automatically.

**Payment Link**: https://aether-pay.pages.dev

### What It Offers
- API key with priority rate limits
- Council session logs & replay
- Email support
- Multi-chain crypto payments (Base USDC, Ethereum ETH, Polygon USDC)

### Bridge API Features
- Agent orchestration for API workflows
- Job queue management for async API tasks
- Browser automation for API testing
- State management for API state
- Monitoring and logging for API tracking
- Webhook integrations for API events

### Technical Details
- **Fee**: 0.5% (XPTP)
- **Settlement**: Instant
- **No KYC required**
- **No account signup**

### Why This Matters for API Developers
API developers need:
- Agent orchestration for complex API workflows
- Job queue management for async API tasks
- Browser automation for API testing
- State management for API state

Aether Bridge API provides all of this with zero-config crypto payments.

### Integration
The API is fully autonomous:
- REST endpoints for all operations
- Webhook support for async events
- API key authentication
- Rate limiting and monitoring

**Aether Wallet**: 0xDe497AF77d0edf1c8B902Ae854987F67c375Fa0

### Questions?
For API access support: bridge@a-to-mind.com

Would this be useful to add to the public-apis list as an agent management solution?
